title: Medical Records
text: How to Get Your Medical Records via MyCHArt. Patients can request 5 years worth of their medical records via MyChart. Complete a Medical Record Authorization Form. Fax to CHA Health Information Management: 617-381-7179. Mail to CHA Medical Records - 103 Garland Street Everett, MA 02149. Email us at HIM3@CHAlliance.org a scan of your hand-signed form as a PDF file.
